name: LLM reasoning center of gravity
allowed_wording: Hypothesis from current metadata: LLM reasoning/post-training is the largest ICML 2026 area and is also overweight relative to nearby accepted-paper baselines.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: Area boundaries include general LLM training/evaluation and some diffusion-language papers; paper-level taxonomy still needs review.
evidence_basis: 1099 taxonomy papers (16.6%); historical delta +2.9 pp; public-attention enrichment 2.03x.
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/8; support rows 0/5 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/4; taxonomy boundary unresolved
falsification_test: Review boundary papers and relabel any that are mainly systems, safety, or general language-model evaluation; recompute whether LLM reasoning still leads the landscape.

name: Infrastructure and agentic workloads
allowed_wording: Hypothesis from current metadata: Systems/efficiency and agents/code look smaller than LLM reasoning by paper count, but both are clear ICML 2026 overweights versus the neighboring-venue baseline.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: Historical comparison uses a keyword scorer; ICML 2025 and NeurIPS 2025 lack static abstracts in the current pull.
evidence_basis: Systems historical delta +2.1 pp, relative 1.68x; Agents historical delta +2.1 pp, relative 1.44x.
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/8; support rows 0/5 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/4; taxonomy boundary unresolved
falsification_test: Read representative systems and agents/code papers and check whether the mechanism is reusable infrastructure, benchmark packaging, or ordinary model training.

name: Program committee attention
allowed_wording: Hypothesis from current metadata: Theory and safety/governance receive more program signal than their public-attention signal would predict.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: Oral/award counts are program signals, not full quality labels; award counts are small and volatile.
evidence_basis: Theory oral enrichment 1.45x vs public enrichment 0.46x; Safety oral enrichment 1.41x and 3 awards vs public enrichment 0.51x.
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/8; support rows 0/5 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/4; taxonomy boundary unresolved
falsification_test: Compare low-public/high-program papers against their abstracts/PDFs and label the committee-selection rationale.

name: Public attention mismatch
allowed_wording: Directional signal: Robotics/embodiment is small by taxonomy count but unusually strong in public attention.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: AlphaXiv likely overweights shareable VLA/world-model work and project-page traffic.
evidence_basis: 195 papers (2.9%); public-attention enrichment 2.11x vs oral enrichment 0.81x.
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/6; support rows 0/4 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/3
falsification_test: Classify high-attention robotics papers as benchmark, demo, reusable model, or core algorithmic contribution and compare with oral/award status.

name: Neighboring-venue contrast
allowed_wording: Directional signal: Multimodal/vision is large inside ICML 2026 but underweight relative to NeurIPS 2025 and ICLR 2026 accepted-paper baselines.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: This is the area most sensitive to venue scope and title/topic classification; ICLR/NeurIPS vision-heavy shares may dominate the baseline average.
evidence_basis: 889 taxonomy papers (13.4%); historical delta -3.1 pp, relative 0.82x.
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/7; support rows 0/4 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/3; taxonomy boundary unresolved
falsification_test: Break the sprint-02 multimodal/vision papers into submodes before interpreting the aggregate underweight/overweight signal.

name: External trend context
allowed_wording: As context only: The fastest broad arXiv growth areas are multimodal/vision, LLM reasoning, and safety/governance, but ICML 2026 does not mirror this ranking exactly.
unsafe_wording: Do not present this as a paper-quality or venue-quality conclusion.
required_caveat: arXiv queries are broad, overlapping, and not acceptance or quality signals.
evidence_basis: Multimodal, Vision, and Perception: 94.6%; LLM Reasoning, Post-Training, and RLVR: 59.9%; Safety, Governance, Privacy, and Society: 53.6%; Systems and Efficient Foundation Models: 43.3%
promotion_condition: none
falsification_test: Run sensitivity checks on broad query terms and accepted-paper baselines before using any trend language.

name: Artifact visibility
allowed_wording: Directional signal: Artifacts are most visible in agents/code, LLM reasoning, systems, and multimodal/vision, while theory remains much less artifact-linked.
unsafe_wording: Do not state as settled, paper-validated, causal, or quality-ranked until acceptance gates pass.
required_caveat: GitHub metadata comes from AlphaXiv and does not prove runnable reproduction; some high-star links are templates or index repos.
evidence_basis: Robotics, Embodiment, and World Models: GitHub URL share 38.0%; Agents, Code, and Tool Use: GitHub URL share 32.9%; LLM Reasoning, Post-Training, and RLVR: GitHub URL share 32.1%; Generative Modeling: GitHub URL share 31.1%
promotion_condition: reviewed rows 0/8; support rows 0/5 with 0 weakening rows; paper notes 0/4; artifact checks 0/5
falsification_test: Open linked repositories for high-signal papers and record license, release state, data/checkpoints, dependencies, and runnable example.

name: Validation priority
allowed_wording: As context only: The biggest remaining quality jump is not more plotting; it is paper-level validation of boundary clusters and high-impact claims.
unsafe_wording: Do not present this as a paper-quality or venue-quality conclusion.
required_caveat: The queue organizes review but does not mean evidence fields have been checked.
evidence_basis: 21 of 42 semantic clusters are marked needs_review; validation queue contains 192 papers across 12 areas.
promotion_condition: none
falsification_test: Audit every report headline against reviewed rows, paper notes, acceptance criteria, and manual caveats before presentation use.
